description: Create a grain storage facility site plan in LibreCAD. The plan must feature four circular bins (Radius 10) on layer BINS (Green) centered at (0,0), (60,0), (0,60), and (60,60), with labels 'BIN-1' through 'BIN-4' placed near their locations on layer TEXT (Yellow). Include a 10x10 dump pit on layer STRUCTURES (Cyan) centered at (30,30) with corners at (25,25) and (35,35), labeled 'DUMP PIT' on layer TEXT (Yellow). Draw an access road on layer ROADS (White/Black) as a rectangle from (-15, 20) to (75, 40). Connect each bin center to the dump pit center with lines on layer CONVEYOR (Red). Include horizontal and vertical dimensions of 60' showing bin spacing on layer DIMENSIONS. Save the final drawing to /home/ga/Documents/LibreCAD/grain_facility.dxf.
